atmosphere.mood: Bustling and businesslike. Money changes hands quietly.
atmosphere.lighting: Bright — good candles, clean oil. Merchants need to read contracts.
atmosphere.smells: Beeswax candles, expensive spiced wine, faint pipe smoke
atmosphere.sounds: Hushed negotiations, clinking coin, the scratch of quill on parchment

layout: A well-appointed common room with private booths along the walls, favored by merchants conducting business. A polished bar of dark wood. Clean rushes on the floor. A discrete back room for private meetings.

drinks.name: Fine cider
drinks.description: Clear and golden, pressed from cultivated apples — a gentleman's refreshment

drinks.name: Imported white wine
drinks.description: Pale and crisp, arrived by the last merchant convoy from the east

drinks.name: Vintage reserve
drinks.description: A small bottle of something exceptional — aged, corked, and priced accordingly

drinks.name: Water
drinks.description: A cup of well water, clear and cold

food.name: Roasted fowl
food.description: Half a chicken, herbs, good bread

food.name: Spiced lamb
food.description: Slow-roasted lamb with cumin and coriander, served on a platter with herb sauce

food.name: Honeyed fruit
food.description: Sliced pear and quince drizzled with honey — a light and refined finish

food.name: Meat pie
food.description: A deep-dish pie of minced pork and herbs, with a golden crust
